description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a black gable roof and white exterior walls, featuring a mix of modern and traditional architectural elements. The front facade includes a covered porch with columns, a prominent entryway, and large arched windows. The property is surrounded by a low hedge and includes a driveway leading to a garage, as well as a fenced backyard with a patio and a swimming pool. The rear of the house showcases a pergola-covered outdoor seating area and multiple large windows for natural light. Mature trees and landscaping elements are present around the house, enhancing its residential appeal. The overall design suggests a comfortable, family-oriented home with ample outdoor and indoor living spaces.
description: A two-story white house with a black gable roof, covered porch, garage, and landscaped yard featuring a pool and patio. The design blends modern and traditional elements with large windows and outdoor living areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, arched windows, and the driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage entrance, driveway, and partial backyard with trees and fencing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, pergola-covered patio, and multiple large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, additional entryway, and more of the hedge boundary.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large arched and rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, steps, and a prominent front door flanked by large arched windows
